_comment: Don Narek Facebook wall — curated by hand (Facebook blocks automated scraping). The carousel shows ONLY each post's picture and its author; no Facebook page chrome/cover. Keep the newest 10 posts at the top of `posts`. Each post: `id` (stable key + motif seed), `author` (person who posted), `url` (permalink, opens the real post), and optionally `image` — a file dropped in src/data/fb/ (e.g. "myphoto.jpg"), bundled at build time so it never hotlinks/expires. A post with no image falls back to an on-brand Armenian motif, so a permalink alone is enough.
